headline: CLARITY Bill Advances to Senate, Crypto Gains 5%

article.title: Patrick Witt defers military training as CLARITY heads to Senate
article.summary: The decision keeps the administration’s chief crypto policy negotiator in place during what could be a decisive few weeks for the CLARITY Act.

headline: Democrats Add 5 Key Rules to Crypto Bill

article.title: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
article.summary: Coinbase vice chair Ryan VanGrack said that Democratic lawmakers had added provisions on customer protection to a digital asset market structure bill under consideration in the US Senate.

headline: Korea Margin Loans Plummet 12% to April Lows

article.title: Korean Stock Traders Slash Margin Loans to Lowest Since April
article.summary: South Korean investors slashed their leveraged stock positions to the lowest level in three months, as memory-chip losses halted the market’s rally.

headline: Asia Stocks Rebound 1.2% as Oil Falls 2%

article.title: Asian Stocks Recover as Chips Rebound, Oil Dips: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Asian equities advanced after three days of losses as a selloff in chip stocks eased ahead of megacap tech earnings this week.

headline: Korea Expands CBDC Pilot to 500,000 Users

article.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
article.summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

headline: Russia's Crypto Law Needs 2 Votes to Pass

article.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
article.summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

headline: Crypto Bill Gains Momentum, Senate Vote Nears

article.title: Trump agrees to ethics provision as crypto bill inches closer to Senate vote
article.summary: President Trump has agreed to ethics language — potentially moving the ball forward to getting crypto legislation passed into law.

headline: Grayscale Files $1B Worldcoin ETF with SEC

article.title: Grayscale could take Worldcoin to Wall Street after ETF filing with the SEC
article.summary: The first exchange-traded fund tied to Worldcoin could soon be headed to U.S. markets, as Grayscale files for a Worldcoin ETF.

headline: US Slaps 50% Tariffs on Canada Goods

article.title: US to hit Canada with 50% tariffs on wide range of goods
article.summary: Washington accuses neighbour of engaging in unfair practices in move that could reignite trade war

headline: Fed Overhaul Sparks $1 Trillion Market Shift
